角色攻略 Character Guide

九原聚怪副C进阶攻略：致命玫约清算、速切循环和灵队定位 Jiuyuan Advanced Grouping Sub-DPS Guide: Rose Pact, Execution and Spirit-Team Role

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-21 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team 阅读时间：13 分钟Read time: 13 min

攻略速览

九原不是单纯后台副C，而是兼具聚怪、挂标记、清算爆发和灵属性联动的功能输出位。她在 5 月版本的价值集中体现在对群体验和速切爆发上，特别适合与娜娜莉等站场主C搭配。

前置条件与接取方式

角色定位

灵属性速切副C / 聚怪 / 清算爆发

核心机制

致命玫约标记从花苞进入玫瑰花后触发清算

队伍环境

灵队、创生队或需要对群补强的主C队伍

九原输出循环

不要急着开大

1

长按E起手

聚怪并挂致命玫约

长按E是九原对群价值的核心。先把敌人拉到一起，后续主C和九原大招才能命中更多目标。

2

等待标记成熟

花苞阶段不要立刻清算

致命玫约需要进入可清算状态。过早开大会浪费爆发窗口，让九原看起来伤害不足。

3

Q触发清算

玫瑰花状态后释放大招

大招命中可清算目标时收益最高，并能改善九原后续循环。对群时尽量确保敌人仍在聚怪范围内。

4

补重击或切主C

根据敌人血量决定是否继续站场

小怪残血可用重击补刀，BOSS或精英战则更适合切主C吃辅助窗口输出。

5

回到辅助循环

等待下一轮E/Q窗口

九原的价值不在长时间站场。完成聚怪、清算和补伤害后，应把场上时间还给主C。

操作误区

标记未成熟就清算

九原最常见的伤害损失来自窗口判断错误。看见敌人被标记不等于可以立刻清算，要确认状态进入玫瑰花阶段。

  • 对群战斗先聚怪再开大，不要让大招只命中一两个目标。
  • BOSS战更重视标记状态和大招命中率，少贪普攻站场。
  • 九原作为副C时，技能等级优先 Q 和 E。

完成奖励

聚怪效率 灵属性副C 清算爆发 娜娜莉联动 开荒舒适度

九原练得好不好，关键看你是否尊重标记成熟和速切节奏。把她当功能爆发位使用，收益会比强行站场更高。

完整解析

九原的上手难度不高，但想打出强度需要理解致命玫约。很多玩家觉得她伤害忽高忽低，原因往往是清算窗口没有对上。标记刚挂上时不急着开大，等进入可清算状态再爆发，伤害体验会完全不同。

她的聚怪价值在开放世界中非常明显。小怪分散会让娜娜莉、薄荷等角色的输出打空，而九原可以把敌人聚到同一范围内，让主C的站场时间更有价值。

九原不建议长时间站场。她完成 E、Q、清算、补刀后就可以退场，把增益窗口交给主C。这样既能保持队伍循环，也能减少她在场上被打断的风险。

在资源投入上，九原优先 Q 和 E。Q 决定清算爆发，E 决定聚怪和挂标记体验。普攻和援护可以后补，不需要在开荒期与主C抢核心材料。

Guide Snapshot

Jiuyuan is a functional damage slot with grouping, marking, execution burst and Spirit synergy. Her May value is highest in multi-target comfort and quick-swap burst, especially beside Nanally and other on-field carries.

Requirements and Entry

Role

Spirit quick-swap sub-DPS / grouping / execution burst

Core mechanic

Deadly Rose Pact matures from bud to rose before execution

Team environment

Spirit teams, Creation teams or any main-DPS team that needs group control

Jiuyuan Damage Cycle

Do not rush the finisher

1

Open with hold E

Group enemies and apply Deadly Rose Pact.

Hold-E is her main multi-target value. Pull enemies together before the main carry or Jiuyuan finisher spends damage.

2

Wait for mark maturity

Do not execute during the bud stage.

Deadly Rose Pact needs to enter the executable state. Early finishers waste the burst window.

3

Use Q to execute

Cast the finisher after the rose state appears.

Q gives the best return on executable targets. Keep enemies inside the grouped area.

4

Add heavy attack or swap

Choose based on remaining enemy health.

Finish small enemies with a quick follow-up, but switch to the main carry in boss or elite fights.

5

Return to support flow

Wait for the next E/Q window.

Jiuyuan is not a long-field unit. After grouping, execution and quick damage, give field time back to the carry.

Common Mistake

Executing before the mark matures

Her most common damage loss is wrong window timing. A marked enemy is not automatically ready for execution.

  • Group before using Q so the finisher hits more than one target.
  • In boss fights, prioritize mark state and Q accuracy over greedy basic attacks.
  • As a sub-DPS, skill priority is Q and E.

Rewards

Grouping efficiency Spirit sub-DPS Execution burst Nanally synergy Comfortable progression

A good Jiuyuan rotation respects mark maturity and quick-swap rhythm. Treat her as a functional burst unit, not a forced on-field carry.

Full Analysis

Jiuyuan is easy to start but rewards understanding Deadly Rose Pact. If her damage feels inconsistent, the execution window is usually misaligned.

Her grouping is extremely valuable in the open world, where scattered enemies cause Nanally, Mint and similar units to miss damage.

Do not keep Jiuyuan on field too long. Use E, Q, execution and a short follow-up, then rotate back to the main DPS.

Resource priority is Q and E. Q controls execution damage; E controls grouping and mark application. Other skills can wait.
